paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.58 as of July 22, 2026, with a change of -1.05% from the prior close and -24.28% over a window of 21 sessions.

Recent news includes the announcement of Fermi Inc.'s second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, which is scheduled for August 13, 2026. There have also been reports on the company's completion of a $375 million offering of 5.00% senior convertible notes due 2031 and the resignation of director designee Miles Everson, who cited governance concerns.

There have been several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K/A filing disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson and a response letter from Everson. Other filings include an 8-K filing regarding the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031 and a SCHEDULE 13G filing. There has been one Form 4 filing in the feed.
